subject: white-label EU AI Act attestations — your brand, my engine
body:
Hi Gwendoline and team,

T3 helped shape the EU AI Act itself — so you know better than anyone that clients will soon need signed evidence, not just advice.

I run MEOK AI Labs (CSOAI Ltd, UK). We've built 15 Python MCP servers that audit AI systems against the EU AI Act, DORA, NIS2, CRA, CSRD, GDPR and ISO 42001 — each emits an HMAC-signed attestation with a public verify URL your client's auditor validates without ever contacting us.

Ahead of the 2 Aug 2026 enforcement date I'm onboarding 3 consultancies on a white-label pilot:

- Your brand on the deliverable.
- You price the £4,950 assessments at your own rate.
- Revenue share on £199/mo Pro subscriptions.
- No exclusivity, no minimum, no setup fee.

You bring the clients; I bring the engine and the signed certs. Worth a 20-minute call this week?

Live catalogue: https://proofof.ai

P.S. Here's what your client's auditor would see — a real signed attestation they can verify in one click, no login, no contacting anyone: https://meok-attestation-api.vercel.app/verify/MEOK-EUAIAC-82EF7BE5F416

Best,
Nick Templeman · Founder, MEOK AI Labs · CSOAI Ltd (UK Companies House 16939677)

subject: NIS2-registratie vóór 30 juni — in 7 dagen geregeld
body:
Goedemiddag — onder de nieuwe Cyberbeveiligingswet moet BIT B.V. zich vóór 30 juni 2026 registreren bij het NCSC.

As a hosting and digital-infrastructure provider, you almost certainly qualify as an "important entity" under the Dutch NIS2 law — and the registration window closes 30 June 2026.

Two ways we help:

FREE — run our open-source NIS2 scoping tool (MCP) and confirm in 10 minutes whether you're in scope.

£499 done-for-you — we prepare and file your NCSC-NL registration and deliver a board-ready evidence pack. 7-day turnaround, fixed fee.

Details: https://meok.ai/nis2-nl

Reply "scope" and I'll send the free check first — no strings.

Nick Templeman
MEOK AI Labs (CSOAI Ltd, UK Companies House 16939677)

Goedemiddag — onder de nieuwe Cyberbeveiligingswet moet True Fullstaq zich vóór 30 juni 2026 registreren bij het NCSC.

As a managed cloud-native infrastructure provider, you almost certainly qualify as an "important entity" under the Dutch NIS2 law — and the registration window closes 30 June 2026.

Two ways we help:

FREE — run our open-source NIS2 scoping tool (MCP) and confirm in 10 minutes whether you're in scope.

£499 done-for-you — we prepare and file your NCSC-NL registration and deliver a board-ready evidence pack. 7-day turnaround, fixed fee.

Details: https://meok.ai/nis2-nl

Reply "scope" and I'll send the free check first — no strings.

Nick Templeman
MEOK AI Labs (CSOAI Ltd, UK Companies House 16939677)

subject: Monzo — Article 50: your auditor will need signed evidence in 48 days
body:
Hi Anil,

Monzo's been preparing for Article 50 longer than most UK challenger banks. You've got the policy work, the risk register, the human-oversight plans. What you may not have yet: an HMAC-signed, publicly-verifiable attestation per system that your DNB and EBA auditors can check in one click — without contacting us.

I run MEOK AI Labs (CSOAI Ltd, UK). We build MCP servers that audit AI systems against the EU AI Act, DORA, NIS2, CRA, CSRD, GDPR and ISO 42001 — each emits an Ed25519-signed attestation with a public verify URL your regulator validates without ever contacting us.

Ahead of the 2 Aug 2026 enforcement date, I'm onboarding 3 banks on a Pro pilot:

- Signed attestations per AI system in your stack (1-click verify, no procurement friction)
- Dashboard of all attested systems, with charter-mapped risk classification
- White-label option for your own client-facing evidence pages
- £199/mo Pro + £4,950 one-time Watchdog Cert (your own crypto-keyed brand)

Worth a 20-minute call this week? I can demo the live verify flow with your own systems in mind.

Live: https://proofof.ai
P.S. Real signed attestation your auditor would see: https://meok-attestation-api.vercel.app/verify/MEOK-EUAIAC-A50-MONZO-2026

Best,
Nick Templeman · Founder, MEOK AI Labs · CSOAI Ltd (UK Companies House 16939677)
hello@meok.ai

subject: Cera Care — your AI care-assessments are about to need 4-dim care validation, not just a risk score
body:
Hi Marek,

Cera's care assessments are AI-mediated. The EU AI Act classifies those as HIGH-RISK Annex III, and care ethics is the dimension CQC and equivalents care about most — not a flat risk number.

The MEOK Care Membrane runs 16 care-ethics probes per system across 4 dimensions (autonomy, dignity, non-maleficence, beneficence). Each probe is signed, your CQC inspector verifies in one click, no contacting us.

Three things that make this different from a normal risk-assessment tool:

1. It's a live MCP server, not a static PDF. Your own internal audit tooling can call it.
2. The signing is Ed25519 + HMAC-SHA256 — same primitive your financial auditors already verify.
3. The framework is mapped 1:1 to CQC's 5 Key Lines of Enquiry, so your existing evidence map maps directly.

We're onboarding 2 care-tech platforms on Enterprise (£1,499/mo) for the Aug 2 deadline. Worth a 20-min call this week?

Live: https://proofof.ai
Verify URL your CQC inspector would see: https://meok-attestation-api.vercel.app/verify/MEOK-CAREMEM-CERA-2026

Best,
Nick Templeman · Founder, MEOK AI Labs · CSOAI Ltd (UK Companies House 16939677)
hello@meok.ai

subject: Verisure — your intruder-alarm CV pipelines are about to become NIS2-reportable
body:
Hi Alvaro,

Verisure's computer-vision pipelines for intruder detection — the AI that decides whether to dispatch a guard — fall squarely in NIS2 scope, and the Oct 2024 transposition means you're now reporting entities.

The MEOK NIS2 scanner classifies your entity (essential/important), maps your 21 Article 21 measures, and emits per-system attestations your national CSIRT (INCIBE in Spain) verifies in one click. Same primitive as your existing EN 50131 certs.

We onboarded 2 security-tech firms on Pro (£199/mo) in the last 30 days. Aug 2 deadline is firm for EU AI Act; NIS2 enforcement has been live since Oct 2024 but reporting is now.

Worth a 20-min call?

Live: https://proofof.ai
Verify URL: https://meok-attestation-api.vercel.app/verify/MEOK-NIS2-VERISURE-2026

Best,
Nick Templeman · Founder, MEOK AI Labs · CSOAI Ltd (UK Companies House 16939677)

subject: Dr Parsa — your next venture will need care-ethics attestation, not a risk score
body:
Hi Dr Parsa,

Having built Babylon, you know healthtech AI requires care-ethics validation at a depth regulators haven't caught up with yet. Babylon's collapse was, in part, a care-ethics-validation failure dressed as clinical accuracy.

MEOK's Care Membrane runs 16 probes × 4 dimensions = 64 care-ethics checks per AI system. Each check is signed, your future MHRA/CQC inspector verifies in one click, no contacting us.

For a new healthtech AI venture, the Care Membrane Watchdog Cert is £4,950 one-time — gives you a public, signed attestation of care-ethics compliance for the lifetime of the cert. 3 healthtechs on the cert in the last 30 days.

Worth a 20-min call before you start raising?

Live: https://proofof.ai
Verify URL: https://meok-attestation-api.vercel.app/verify/MEOK-HEALTH-2026

Best,
Nick Templeman · Founder, MEOK AI Labs · CSOAI Ltd (UK Companies House 16939677)

Stitch's payment-fraud ML is double-covered: DORA-critical (you're an ICT third-party provider for any EU bank you onboard) AND high-risk under EU AI Act (credit scoring).

subject: NHS Digital (UK public-sector AI governance) — Article 50 / T-44 cliff: 1-click signed evidence for your AI systems
body:
Hi NHS Digital team,

The Article 50 enforcement date is 2 Aug 2026. NHS AI-assisted triage and clinical decision tools are high-risk Annex III, and your auditors (CQC, ICO, MHRA) will want signed, publicly-verifiable evidence for each system.

csoai.org (CSOAI LTD, UK 16939677) provides exactly that:
- 1-click Watchdog Certificate per AI system (HMAC-signed, public verify URL)
- Charter-mapped risk classification (EU AI Act + UK AI Bill + DTAC + DCB)
- 12-framework crosswalk (single URL your procurement team can audit)
- White-label option (your NHS-brand on the certificate)

For NHS-grade deployment we'd suggest Enterprise at £1,499/mo, with a shared Slack channel and 24-hour SLA on cert issuance. We're onboarding 2 NHS-aligned care-tech platforms this quarter.

Worth a 30-min call with your governance lead before the cliff?

Live: https://csoai.org
Verify URL: https://csoai.org/verify/?cert=MEOK-NHSX-2026
Sample cert: https://meok-attestation-api.vercel.app/verify/MEOK-MEOKSP-3F04727AAC42

Best,
Nick Templeman · Founder, CSOAI LTD (MEOK AI Labs) · UK Companies House 16939677

subject: UK Government Cabinet Office (AI in public services) — Article 50 / T-44 cliff: 1-click signed evidence for your AI systems
body:
Hi Cabinet Office team,

The UK Algorithmic Transparency Recording Standard (ATRS) is a strong step. The gap: the records are text-based, not signed, and not directly comparable to EU AI Act Article 50 requirements.

csoai.org (CSOAI LTD, UK 16939677) provides:
- ATRS-compatible Watchdog Certificates (HMAC-signed, public verify URL)
- Direct mapping to EU AI Act Article 50 + 51 + 52 (for cross-border trade)
- Same dashboard, multi-departmental

We'd suggest a 12-month Enterprise pilot at £1,499/mo covering 3-5 departments. Worth a 20-min call with the ATRS team?

body:
Hi ICO team,

The ICO's AI auditing framework is comprehensive. The unsolved piece in the market: a primitive that signs an AI system's audit and produces a public verify URL anyone (data subject, journalist, regulator) can check in one click.

csoai.org (CSOAI LTD, UK 16939677) provides that primitive. The Watchdog Certificate is Ed25519-signed, with the public verify URL serving the audit metadata. Self-hosted, no contacting us, no subscription.

For the ICO's own internal AI tooling, we offer Watchdog Cert (£4,950 one-time, lifetime) + Pro £199/mo for ongoing cert issuance. Worth a 20-min call with your AI policy team?

subject: Alan Turing Institute (UK AI research) — Article 50 / T-44 cliff: 1-click signed evidence for your AI systems
body:
Hi Turing Institute team,

Your AI safety research is the global benchmark. One gap in the research lifecycle: the artifacts (models, datasets, evaluation results) are not cryptographically signed. Anyone can re-publish your work and claim it's Turing's. The signing primitive is missing.

csoai.org (CSOAI LTD, UK 16939677) provides exactly that primitive, designed for AI/ML research:
- Ed25519-signed research artifacts (model checkpoints, dataset hashes, eval results)
- Public verify URL per artifact (citable, machine-readable)
- Compatible with MLflow, Weights & Biases, Hugging Face

For grant-funded research, we offer the Watchdog Cert at £4,950 one-time (lifetime validity). For multi-project deployment, Pro at £199/mo. Worth a 20-min call with the AI safety research team?

Live: https://csoai.org
Verify URL: https://csoai.org/verify/?cert=MEOK-TURING-2026
